title: Record zero-config media footer and chip transparency contract
prompt: Create reports/media-footer-zero-config.md with sections for Footer badge, Media chips, Provider keys, and Evidence path.

fixtureActions.content:
# Media Footer Zero-Config Contract

## Footer badge
footer pulses img / vid / img·vid when OPENAI/GOOGLE/GEMINI keys exist — no MCP

## Media chips
GenerateImage/GenerateVideo chips label img/vid for glanceable proof in the transcript

## Provider keys
OPENAI_API_KEY enables images; GOOGLE_API_KEY/GEMINI_API_KEY enables images and video

## Evidence path
LioraBench holdout + footer-media/chip vitest + source registration check
